vocab.meaning: tinh thần đồng đội, sự gắn kết trong một nhóm
vocab.example: Being part of the football club really helped us develop a strong esprit de corps that carried us to the finals.

vocab.meaning: tình bạn thân thiết, sự đồng lòng giữa những người cùng chí hướng
vocab.example: What I loved most about the basketball team was the genuine sense of camaraderie we shared on and off the court.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng tinh thần thể thao (sự công bằng, tôn trọng)
vocab.example: Competitive sports are excellent because they foster sportsmanship and teach you how to lose with grace.

vocab.meaning: phối hợp nhịp nhàng các nỗ lực
vocab.example: In rowing, you have to synchronize your efforts perfectly with your teammates to maintain maximum speed.

vocab.meaning: một vai trò then chốt/quan trọng
vocab.example: As the goalkeeper, I played a pivotal role in organizing the defense during high-pressure matches.

vocab.meaning: sự cống hiến kiên định, không lay chuyển
vocab.example: The team's success was largely due to the unwavering dedication of every player during the grueling training sessions.
Joining the school swimming team gave me a competitive edge and pushed me to surpass my personal limits.

vocab.word: resilience in the face of adversity
vocab.meaning: sự kiên cường khi đối mặt với nghịch cảnh/khó khăn
vocab.example: Team sports taught me resilience in the face of adversity, especially when we had to overcome a significant points deficit.

vocab.meaning: năng lực/sự thành thạo về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: Our coach was renowned for his tactical prowess, often outsmarting teams that were physically stronger than us.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần/rèn luyện tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Being part of a professional sports academy helped instill discipline in my daily routine from a very young age.
